title: The Colosseum
short: Ancient amphitheatre in Rome, used for games and public events.

title: The Roman Forum
short: The central public space in ancient Rome, used for various activities.

title: Trevi Fountain
short: Famous Baroque fountain in Rome, known for its stunning architecture.

title: Vittorio Emanuele II Monument
short: Monument dedicated to the first king of unified Italy.

title: Statue of David
short: Sculpture by Michelangelo, representing the biblical hero David.

title: San Gimignano
short: Medieval town in Tuscany, known for its towers and architecture.
